reference: Hi and welcome to HCM. I am sorry about such a serious disease. This is obviously a terminal stage and one of the worst cancers. Unfortunately, the prognosis is not very good; it is always hard to predict. However, you have to do everything you can, including chemotherapy, which can prolong life expectancy for three to six months. Usually, a one-year survival rate is found in less than five%. She can benefit from palliative treatment for pain, nausea, and fatigue. Everything else is not in your hands. I wish you good health.
text: I am not going to have my book be used to help people steal things from other people. No, no, no.
